description: It's femininity celebrated and enhanced with this pair of sandals from Inc. 5. With its sleek design and simple style, this pair looks great when paired with ethnic wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 1.5" Upper Synthetic leather footbed with a shiny strip on the mid length and heel padding for absolute comfort and style Synthetic leather twisted strap with check print on the medial side to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable TPU non-slip outsole textured in the heel region, has horizontal grooves on the forehoot and horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
